d.t: Kể về chuyến đi gần nhất

e.p: How was your last trip?
e.m: Nói bạn đã đi đâu và khi nào. Nói một hoạt động bạn làm ở đó.
e.h: Past Simple + time word (e.g., last week).
e.s: I went to a beach town last weekend. I walked on the sand and swam once.

e.p: Who did you travel with?
e.m: Nói ai đi với bạn. Nói một điều bạn làm cùng người đó.
e.h: Past Simple; use 'with' to show company.
e.s: I traveled with my friend. We ate at a local restaurant together.

e.p: What was the weather like there?
e.m: Mô tả thời tiết. Nói cách thời tiết ảnh hưởng đến kế hoạch của bạn.
e.h: Past Simple + so/because to show result.
e.s: It was sunny during the day. Because of that we spent more time on the beach.

e.p: Did you buy any souvenirs?
e.m: Nói nếu bạn mua đồ hay không. Nói lý do bạn mua hoặc không mua.
e.h: Past Simple; use because/so for reason.
e.s: I bought a small keychain at the market. I bought it because it was cheap and nice.

e.p: Would you go back there soon?
e.m: Nói nếu bạn muốn quay lại. Nói lý do ngắn gọn cho quyết định đó.
e.h: Use will/going to + reason; short Past Simple reason first.
e.s: I enjoyed the trip so I will go back next year. The beach was relaxing and the food was good.

d.t: Ở sân bay và hành lý

e.p: How was your arrival at the airport?
e.m: Nói bạn đến sân bay lúc nào. Nói một việc bạn làm ở sân bay.
e.h: Past Simple + time; simple action.
e.s: I arrived at the airport two hours before the flight. I checked in and waited at the gate.

e.p: Did you have any problem with your luggage?
e.m: Nói có vấn đề với hành lý không. Nói hành động bạn đã làm để giải quyết.
e.h: Past Simple; use 'so' for result if needed.
e.s: My suitcase was heavy so the staff helped me. They put it on the scale and I paid extra.

e.p: What did you do while waiting for the plane?
e.m: Nói một hoạt động bạn làm. Nói cảm xúc của bạn khi chờ.
e.h: Past Simple; add an emotion word from vocab list.
e.s: I bought a coffee and sat near the window. I felt relaxed while I watched planes.

e.p: Was the flight on time?
e.m: Nói chuyến bay có đúng giờ hay không. Nói lý do ngắn (nếu có) bằng 'because' hoặc 'so'.
e.h: Past Simple + because/so.
e.s: The flight was delayed by one hour because of the weather. We waited patiently at the gate.

e.p: What advice would you give someone packing for a short trip?
e.m: Đưa một lời khuyên về đóng gói. Nói lý do rõ ràng cho lời khuyên đó.
e.h: Use should/have to + reason (Past or general advice).
e.s: You should pack light for a short trip. It is easier to move and cheaper if you avoid extra baggage.

e.p: How was your hotel room?
e.m: Mô tả phòng (ngắn). Nói một điều bạn thích về phòng.
e.h: Past Simple; use adjectives like comfortable, clean.
e.s: The room was clean and quiet. I liked the comfortable bed.

e.p: Did you have breakfast at the hotel?
e.m: Nói có ăn sáng không. Nói món bạn ăn hoặc trải nghiệm ngắn.
e.h: Past Simple; mention a food word.
e.s: Yes, I had breakfast at the hotel every morning. I ate eggs and fresh fruit.

e.p: Was the staff helpful when you checked in?
e.m: Nói họ có giúp bạn không. Nói việc họ đã làm để giúp.
e.h: Past Simple; use 'they' + verb.
e.s: The staff was very helpful. They carried my luggage and explained the wifi.

e.p: Did you compare this hotel with another place?
e.m: Nói một so sánh ngắn với một nơi khác. Nói lý do bạn thấy nơi này tốt/hơn.
e.h: Use comparatives (better/more comfortable) and Past Simple.
e.s: This hotel was more comfortable than the guesthouse I used before. The room was cleaner and quieter.

e.p: If you had a problem with the room, what would you do next time?
e.m: Nói hành động bạn sẽ làm nếu còn vấn đề. Nói lý do cho quyết định đó.
e.h: Use will/going to + reason or 'have to' for obligation.
e.s: I will ask the reception to change the room if there is a problem. It is faster and they can fix it.

e.p: What did you do on the beach?
e.m: Nói hai hoạt động bạn làm trên bãi biển.
e.h: Past Simple; list two actions with 'and'.
e.s: I swam in the sea and walked along the shore. I also sat and read a book for a while.

e.p: Did you try any water sports?
e.m: Nói có thử hay không. Nói cảm giác của bạn sau khi thử.
e.h: Past Simple + emotion word.
e.s: I tried kayaking once and I felt excited. The water was calm so it was easy.

e.p: How did you spend the evening there?
e.m: Mô tả buổi tối bạn làm gì. Nói tại sao bạn làm điều đó.
e.h: Past Simple; use because/so for reason.
e.s: We ate at a beach restaurant and watched the sunset. We chose that place because it had a good view.

e.p: Was the beach more crowded than you expected?
e.m: So sánh mức độ đông hơn/ít hơn. Nói lý do ngắn cho sự khác biệt.
e.h: Use comparatives (more/less) and Past Simple.
e.s: The beach was more crowded than I expected. It was a weekend so many families came.

e.p: How would you plan a better beach weekend next time?
e.m: Nói hai việc bạn sẽ làm để cải thiện chuyến đi sau. Nói lý do ngắn cho mỗi việc.
e.h: Use will/going to + reason; two short points.
e.s: I will book a hotel near the beach to save time. I will also bring sunscreen because it was very sunny.

e.p: Where did you hike last time?
e.m: Nói tên nơi/ngọn núi hoặc mô tả ngắn. Nói khi nào.
e.h: Past Simple + time word.
e.s: I hiked on a small mountain near my city last Saturday. The trail was short but steep.

e.p: Did you enjoy the view?
e.m: Nói cảm xúc về cảnh. Nói một chi tiết bạn thấy đẹp.
e.h: Past Simple; use emotion vocab like relaxed, surprised.
e.s: Yes, I felt relaxed by the view. The valley looked green and peaceful.

e.p: Was the weather good for hiking?
e.m: Mô tả thời tiết. Nói cách thời tiết ảnh hưởng đến hoạt động của bạn.
e.h: Past Simple + so/because.
e.s: It was cloudy in the morning so the hike was cooler. We walked more because it was not too hot.

e.p: Did you find the hike harder than you thought?
e.m: So sánh mức độ khó với kỳ vọng. Nói lý do ngắn.
e.h: Use comparatives (harder/easier) and Past Simple.
e.s: The hike was harder than I expected. The path was steep and rocky.

e.p: What should someone bring for a mountain weekend?
e.m: Nói hai vật cần mang theo. Nói lý do ngắn cho mỗi thứ.
e.h: Use should + reason; two short items.
e.s: You should bring good walking shoes because the path is rough. You should also carry water to stay hydrated.

d.t: Ăn uống và nhà hàng khi đi chơi

e.p: Where did you eat during your trip?
e.m: Nói loại quán bạn đã ăn (ví dụ: restaurant, market). Nói món bạn đã thử.
e.h: Past Simple; mention food word.
e.s: I ate at a small restaurant near the hotel. I tried the local seafood.

e.p: How was the food?
e.m: Mô tả hương vị ngắn. Nói cảm xúc của bạn về món ăn.
e.h: Past Simple + emotion vocab.
e.s: The food was delicious and fresh. I felt very happy with the taste.

e.p: Did you pay by cash or card?
e.m: Nói cách bạn trả tiền. Nói nếu có vấn đề khi trả.
e.h: Past Simple; use 'cash' or 'card'.
e.s: I paid by card at the restaurant. There was no problem with the payment.

e.p: Was the restaurant more expensive than you expected?
e.m: So sánh giá cả với mong đợi. Nói lý do ngắn (ví dụ: location, menu).
e.h: Use comparatives (more expensive) and Past Simple.
e.s: The restaurant was more expensive than I expected. It was near the beach and had a sea view.

e.p: Would you recommend that restaurant to friends?
e.m: Nói bạn có giới thiệu không. Nói một lý do chính cho quyết định.
e.h: Use would/will + reason; simple recommendation.
e.s: I would recommend it because the food was fresh and the view was nice. My friend would enjoy the place too.

e.p: Did you visit any markets?
e.m: Nói có hay không. Nói một món bạn đã xem hoặc mua.
e.h: Past Simple; use market/shop vocabulary.
e.s: Yes, I visited the local market. I looked at colorful scarves and bought one.

e.p: Was anything very cheap or expensive?
e.m: Nói một món rẻ hoặc đắt. Nói giá cảm nhận ngắn (cheap/expensive).
e.h: Past Simple; use 'cheap' or 'expensive'.
e.s: A handmade bag was quite expensive. A small souvenir keychain was cheap.

e.p: Did you try to bargain?
e.m: Nói có mặc cả không. Nói kết quả ngắn (thành công hay không).
e.h: Past Simple; use verbs like 'bargained' or 'asked for discount'.
e.s: I bargained for a small painting and got a discount. The seller agreed after I asked.

e.p: Which was better: the market or the mall?
e.m: So sánh ngắn giữa chợ và trung tâm thương mại. Nói lý do bạn chọn bên nào.
e.h: Use comparatives (better/more comfortable) and Past Simple.
e.s: The mall was more comfortable than the market. However, the market had cheaper items and local food.

e.p: What will you do next time to save money while shopping?
e.m: Nói hai việc bạn sẽ làm để tiết kiệm. Nói lý do ngắn cho mỗi việc.
e.h: Use will + two short reasons.
e.s: I will compare prices before buying to avoid overspending. I will also bargain at the market because it often lowers the price.

d.t: Gặp gỡ và gặp lại bạn bè

e.p: Did you meet anyone interesting on the trip?
e.m: Nói có gặp người thú vị không. Nói họ là ai (ngắn).
e.h: Past Simple; simple description of person.
e.s: Yes, I met a friendly tour guide. He told us many local stories.

e.p: Did you meet an old friend during your weekend?
e.m: Nói có gặp bạn cũ không. Nói bạn đã làm gì với họ.
e.h: Past Simple; use 'met' for meeting.
e.s: I met an old friend at the market. We had coffee and talked for an hour.

e.p: How did meeting them change your plans?
e.m: Nói nếu kế hoạch thay đổi. Nói thay đổi gì bằng 'so' hoặc 'because'.
e.h: Past Simple + so/because to show result.
e.s: Meeting my friend changed my plans so I stayed longer in town. We decided to have dinner together.

e.p: Was it better to travel alone or with friends this time?
e.m: So sánh hai lựa chọn. Nói lý do ngắn bạn chọn phương án đó.
e.h: Use comparatives (better) and Past Simple or general statement.
e.s: Traveling with friends was better this time because I felt safer and had fun company. Alone trips can be quieter but less social.

e.p: What should you tell a friend who wants to visit the place?
e.m: Đưa hai lời khuyên ngắn cho bạn đó. Nói lý do cho mỗi lời khuyên.
e.h: Use should + two brief reasons.
e.s: They should book accommodation early because places fill up fast. They should also check the weather forecast to pack properly.

e.p: Tell me about a memorable moment from the trip.
e.m: Nói một khoảnh khắc bạn nhớ. Nói khi nó xảy ra.
e.h: Past Simple; mention time or moment word.
e.s: I watched a beautiful sunrise at the beach early in the morning. The sky was orange and calm.

e.p: Why was that moment special?
e.m: Nói lý do ngắn tại sao bạn ghi nhớ. Nói cảm xúc bạn cảm nhận.
e.h: Past Simple; use emotion vocab (excited, proud, relaxed).
e.s: It was special because I felt very relaxed after a busy week. I felt peaceful and happy.

e.p: Did anything unexpected happen during that event?
e.m: Nói điều bất ngờ nếu có. Nói cách bạn phản ứng với nó.
e.h: Past Simple + so/because for reaction.
e.s: A small boat passed close to the shore unexpectedly so I waved at the sailors. They smiled and waved back.

e.p: Was that experience better than similar ones before?
e.m: So sánh với trải nghiệm trước đây. Nói lý do ngắn cho so sánh.
e.h: Use comparatives (better) and Past Simple.
e.s: This experience was better than others because the view and weather were perfect. Previous trips had cloudy mornings.

e.p: What will you remember about this trip in one year?
e.m: Nói hai điều bạn sẽ nhớ sau một năm. Nói lý do ngắn cho mỗi điều.
e.h: Use will + two items and short reasons.
e.s: I will remember the sunrise because it was peaceful and beautiful. I will also remember the kind people we met because they helped us a lot.

d.t: Gặp sự cố khi đi du lịch

e.p: Did anything go wrong during the trip?
e.m: Nói có sự cố không. Nói ngắn sự cố đó là gì.
e.h: Past Simple; simple negative or problem statement.
e.s: Yes, my phone battery died on the first day. I could not use maps for a while.

e.p: How did you solve that problem?
e.m: Nói hành động bạn đã làm để giải quyết. Nói kết quả ngắn.
e.h: Past Simple; use verbs like charged, asked, borrowed.
e.s: I bought a power bank at a shop and charged my phone. After that I could use maps again.

e.p: Did the problem change your mood or plans?
e.m: Nói ảnh hưởng đến cảm xúc hoặc kế hoạch bằng 'so' hoặc 'because'.
e.h: Past Simple + so/because.
e.s: The problem made me worried at first so I walked more slowly. Later I felt better because I fixed it.

e.p: Was the trip worse than you expected because of that issue?
e.m: So sánh tổng quan trước và sau sự cố. Nói lý do ngắn.
e.h: Use comparatives (worse/better) and Past Simple.
e.s: The trip was not worse overall despite the issue. We still enjoyed many activities and good food.

e.p: What should travelers do to avoid similar problems?
e.m: Đưa hai lời khuyên ngắn để tránh vấn đề. Nói lý do cho mỗi lời khuyên.
e.h: Use should + two brief reasons.
e.s: They should bring a power bank because phones run out of battery. They should also keep copies of important tickets to avoid stress.

d.t: Lên kế hoạch cho chuyến đi

e.p: How did you prepare before your trip?
e.m: Nói hai việc bạn làm để chuẩn bị. Nói khi bạn làm chúng.
e.h: Past Simple; two short actions with time if possible.
e.s: I booked the hotel two weeks before the trip. I also packed clothes and documents the night before.

e.p: Did you check the weather forecast?
e.m: Nói có kiểm tra không. Nói kết quả ngắn và hành động bạn làm theo dự báo.
e.h: Past Simple; use weather words.
e.s: Yes, I checked the forecast and it said sunny. So I packed light clothes and sunscreen.

e.p: How did you buy tickets or book transport?
e.m: Nói cách bạn đặt vé (online/at counter). Nói nếu có vấn đề khi đặt.
e.h: Past Simple; mention online or cash/card.
e.s: I booked the bus tickets online with my card. There was no problem and I received the confirmation email.

e.p: Was planning this trip easier than before?
e.m: So sánh mức độ dễ với lần trước. Nói lý do ngắn.
e.h: Use comparatives (easier/harder) and Past Simple.
e.s: This planning was easier than last time because I found better information online. The booking process was simpler too.

e.p: What will you do differently in planning your next trip?
e.m: Nói hai thay đổi bạn sẽ làm trong lần tới. Nói lý do ngắn cho mỗi thay đổi.
e.h: Use will + two brief reasons.
e.s: I will plan more free time so I can relax between activities. I will also compare transport options to save money.

e.p: How did you feel after the trip?
e.m: Nói một cảm xúc chính bạn có. Nói lý do ngắn cho cảm xúc đó.
e.h: Past Simple + emotion vocab.
e.s: I felt relaxed after the trip. I had a good rest and enjoyed the beach.

e.p: Were you more tired or more happy?
e.m: Chọn một trong hai và nêu lý do ngắn.
e.h: Use comparatives (more tired/more happy) and Past Simple.
e.s: I was more happy than tired. The rest and company improved my mood.

e.p: Did the trip help you with work or study?
e.m: Nói nếu chuyến đi hữu ích cho công việc/học tập. Nói cách nó giúp bạn.
e.h: Past Simple; use words like improve, practice.
e.s: The trip helped me relax so I returned to work with more energy. It improved my focus for a few days.

e.p: Was this trip better for relaxation or for adventure?
e.m: Chọn một và so sánh ngắn với lý do.
e.h: Use comparatives and Past Simple.
e.s: The trip was better for relaxation than adventure. We chose calm beaches and easy activities.

e.p: What must you do after you get home from a trip?
e.m: Nói hai việc bạn phải làm sau khi về nhà. Nói lý do ngắn cho mỗi việc.
e.h: Use must/have to + two short reasons.
e.s: I must unpack my luggage to be organized and clean. I have to check emails to catch up with work.

d.t: Ghi lại kỷ niệm và hình ảnh

e.p: Did you take photos on the trip?
e.m: Nói có chụp ảnh không. Nói một điều bạn chụp.
e.h: Past Simple; mention photo or camera.
e.s: Yes, I took many photos during the trip. I took pictures of the sunrise and the beach.

e.p: Where did you keep your photos?
e.m: Nói bạn lưu ảnh ở đâu (phone, cloud). Nói lý do ngắn.
e.h: Past Simple; use 'on my phone' or 'in the cloud'.
e.s: I saved most photos on my phone and a few in the cloud. This protected them in case my phone had a problem.

e.p: Did you show the photos to your family?
e.m: Nói bạn có cho người thân xem không. Nói phản ứng họ ngắn gọn.
e.h: Past Simple; mention reaction like 'they liked it'.
e.s: I showed the photos to my family after I returned. They liked the pictures and asked questions.

e.p: Are photos more important than souvenirs for you?
e.m: So sánh ngắn giữa ảnh và đồ lưu niệm. Nói lý do bạn nghĩ thế.
e.h: Use comparatives (more important) and Past Simple or general reason.
e.s: Photos are more important to me than souvenirs because they keep memories without extra luggage. Souvenirs are nice but heavier.

e.p: What will you do with the best photos from the trip?
e.m: Nói hai việc bạn sẽ làm với ảnh đẹp. Nói lý do ngắn cho mỗi việc.
e.h: Use will + two brief actions and reasons.
e.s: I will print a few favorite photos to put on my wall because they remind me of good times. I will also share them with friends so they can see the trip.

e.p: Which trip was better last year or this year?
e.m: Chọn một chuyến và nêu lý do ngắn.
e.h: Use comparatives (better) and Past Simple.
e.s: This year's trip was better because the weather was nicer. We also found a quieter beach.

e.p: Was the accommodation cheaper before or now?
e.m: So sánh giá cả giữa hai lần. Nói lý do ngắn.
e.h: Use comparatives (cheaper/more expensive) and Past Simple.
e.s: The accommodation was cheaper last year. Prices increased this year because of the holiday season.

e.p: Did you enjoy food more on one trip?
e.m: Nói chuyến nào ăn ngon hơn. Nêu một món làm bạn ấn tượng.
e.h: Past Simple; name one food item.
e.s: I enjoyed the food more this year. A fresh seafood dish at a local restaurant impressed me.

e.p: Which trip had better weather?
e.m: So sánh thời tiết giữa hai chuyến. Nói lý do ngắn.
e.h: Use comparatives and Past Simple; mention weather words.
e.s: This trip had better weather with sunny days and light wind. The older trip had more rain.

e.p: What will you keep the same and what will you change next time?
e.m: Nói một điều bạn sẽ giữ nguyên và một điều bạn sẽ thay đổi. Nói lý do ngắn cho mỗi quyết định.
e.h: Use will + one keep and one change with reasons.
e.s: I will keep choosing quiet places because they help me relax. I will change my travel dates to avoid the busiest weekends.

e.p: Summarize your last trip in two sentences.
e.m: Nói nơi bạn đến và khi nào. Nói một hoạt động chính bạn làm ở đó.
e.h: Past Simple; two clear sentences.
e.s: I went to a coastal town last month. I spent time on the beach and tried local seafood.

e.p: Mention one problem you had and how you fixed it.
e.m: Nói một sự cố ngắn. Nói cách bạn giải quyết nó.
e.h: Past Simple + so/because for solution.
e.s: My phone battery died so I bought a power bank. After that I could use maps and took photos again.

e.p: Say one thing you liked and one thing you would change.
e.m: Nói một điểm bạn thích. Nói một điều bạn sẽ thay đổi và lý do.
e.h: Past Simple + will + reason.
e.s: I liked the quiet beach and good food. Next time I will book earlier to get a better room.

e.p: Compare this trip to a previous one briefly.
e.m: Nói chuyến này tốt hơn hay kém hơn. Nói một lý do ngắn.
e.h: Use comparative (better/worse) and Past Simple.
e.s: This trip was better because the weather was perfect. The previous trip had more rain and crowds.

e.p: Give two quick tips for someone visiting the same place.
e.m: Đưa hai lời khuyên ngắn. Nói lý do cho mỗi lời khuyên.
e.h: Use should/will + two short reasons.
e.s: You should bring sunscreen because it is very sunny. You should also book a table at popular restaurants to avoid waiting.

e.p: Describe your last weekend in two sentences.
e.m: Nói bạn đã làm gì cuối tuần rồi (2 hành động).
e.h: Past Simple; connect actions with 'and'.
e.s: I visited a market and walked along the river. I also met a friend for coffee.

e.p: Say how the weather affected your weekend.
e.m: Mô tả thời tiết. Nói một kết quả ngắn vì thời tiết.
e.h: Past Simple + so/because.
e.s: It was sunny so we spent more time outside. We enjoyed the park and took photos.

e.p: Mention one difference between this weekend and last month.
e.m: Nói một sự khác biệt ngắn. Nói lý do (nếu có).
e.h: Use comparative (more/less) and Past Simple.
e.s: This weekend was more relaxed than last month because I had fewer meetings. I could sleep more.

e.p: What should someone do to have a good weekend there?
e.m: Đưa hai việc nên làm để cuối tuần vui. Nói lý do cho mỗi việc.
e.h: Use should + two brief reasons.
e.s: They should visit the local market for food and souvenirs because it is lively. They should also walk by the river to relax.

e.p: Will you repeat this weekend plan next time? Why or why not?
e.m: Nói có lặp lại kế hoạch không. Nói một lý do chính cho quyết định.
e.h: Use will + reason; past reference optional.
e.s: I will repeat the plan because I felt relaxed and had fun. The activities suited my mood and schedule.

d.t: Ôn tập: Tổng hợp tình huống

e.p: Tell a short story about a travel day in two sentences.
e.m: Nói nơi bạn đi và hai hoạt động chính trong ngày.
e.h: Past Simple; two actions connected logically.
e.s: I went to a nearby island for a day trip. I swam in the morning and explored the market in the afternoon.

e.p: Explain one unexpected event and your reaction.
e.m: Nói sự kiện bất ngờ ngắn. Nói bạn đã làm gì ngay sau đó.
e.h: Past Simple + so/because for reaction.
e.s: The boat was late so we waited at the pier. I read a book while waiting to stay calm.

e.p: Compare your travel experience with staying at home.
e.m: Nói du lịch tốt hơn hay ở nhà tốt hơn. Nói một lý do ngắn.
e.h: Use comparatives and Past Simple or general statement.
e.s: Traveling was better because I relaxed and saw new places. Staying home is comfortable but less exciting.

e.p: Give a brief suggestion for someone planning the same trip.
e.m: Đưa một lời khuyên ngắn. Nói lý do rõ ràng cho lời khuyên đó.
e.h: Use should/have to + reason.
e.s: They should check transport times in advance to avoid delays. It helps to plan activities smoothly.

e.p: Say two things you learned from the trip.
e.m: Nói hai bài học/nghiệp vụ bạn học được. Nói lý do ngắn cho mỗi bài học.
e.h: Past Simple or general 'I learned' + two brief reasons.
e.s: I learned to pack lighter because it makes travel easier. I also learned to book early to get better prices.
